positive: A whimsical, deeply detailed celestial fox curled up in a moonlit forest clearing. The fox has glowing, ethereal fur that blends seamlessly with the nebula patterns in the sky. Surrounded by bioluminescent flora, delicate floating geometric constellations, and stylized crescent moons. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, designed to fit perfectly on fabric. Style: Minimalist vaporwave folklore mixed with Art Nouveau elegance. Lighting: Dramatic, high-contrast glow emanating from the fox and plants, with deep blues, vibrant turquoise, lilac, and luminous golds. Print-friendly: Crisp linework, clean silhouettes, solid areas of color contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, poor composition, ugly, malformed, lowres, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, signature, signature, poorly drawn, cropped, jpeg artifacts
